## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

Describe exactly how you tested this change.

- [ ] flutter test

## Screenshots or recordings

Add UI screenshots or short recordings when relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused and reviewed my own changes.
- [ ] I updated docs where behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
- [ ] I checked for regressions in playback/search/recommendations.
